title: StarfieldWebUI View Manifest
description: Schema for views/<id>/manifest.json. Bridge protocol 0.1 (unstable). Mirrors src/runtime/ViewManifest.cpp.

$schema.description: Optional editor hint; ignored by the runtime.

id.description: Unique view id. Matches the folder name and config.json's "view". Required.

entry.description: Relative path to the entry HTML, inside the view folder. Absolute paths and any '..' component are rejected.

width.description: Initial view width. The d3d12 compositor resizes the view to the screen aspect at runtime; author responsive CSS.

height.description: Initial view height (resized at runtime; capped at 1440).

transparent.description: Render with an alpha channel so the game shows through unpainted areas.

zorder.description: Compositing layer when several views are hosted. Lower draws beneath, higher on top. Ties keep load order.

interactive.description: Whether this view may receive input and become the active (focused) view. Set false for passive overlays like a HUD.

permissions.description: Capability grants. Everything defaults to deny.

nativeBridge.description: Inject window.starfield. If false, no bridge is created and the page runs purely client-side.

filesystem.description: Reserved; no implementation enforces this yet.

network.description: Reserved; forced off with a warning if set true.
